bead.title: Add release-readiness claim inventory gate
bead.description:
Context: The readiness plan converged only after making release/readiness/version claims mechanically visible before any docs sweep. Current evidence is inconsistent: Cargo is 0.4.0 while PRD and release artifacts discuss 0.7.1. Add or update a repo-local check that inventories release target claims, ready-to-use claims, PRD success criteria, p99 claims, deferred decisions, and DDx frontmatter/hash implications across HELIX docs.

In-scope files: tests or scripts for the inventory check; docs/helix only as fixtures or documented scope.

Out-of-scope: deciding the release target, changing product claims, or fixing every inventory result in this bead.
bead.acceptance:
1. `python3 tests/test_release_readiness_claims.py --format text` passes.
2. `python3 tests/test_release_readiness_claims.py --format json` exits 0 and emits the claim inventory.
3. `ddx doc validate` passes.
